summary: Tested face photo feature and HR page tabs. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: face photo button visible in employee actions, face photo dialog opens with employee name/UID/refresh button, employee avatars display in name column, all 9 HR tabs work correctly, auto-sync toggle present in biometric devices tab.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/employees/{id}/face-photo (line 2919-2941) saves face_photo and face_photo_updated_at to employee record
VERIFIED: EmployeeResponse model (line 1405-1428) includes face_photo and face_photo_updated_at fields
VERIFIED: EmployeeUpdate model (line 1430-1447) includes face_photo field for updates
VERIFIED: GET /api/employees returns face_photo and face_photo_updated_at fields
VERIFIED: HR.js face photo button with data-testid='face-photo-{id}' (line 1525-1530)
VERIFIED: HR.js face photo dialog shows employee name, UID, position, and refresh button (line 438-499)
VERIFIED: HR.js employee avatar in name column - shows photo or initial letter (line 1491-1499)
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js auto-sync with toast notifications for new attendance (line 79-136)
VERIFIED: All 9 HR tabs present and clickable: الموظفين, الحضور, السلف, الخصومات, المكافآت, الأوقات الإضافية, كشوفات الرواتب, تقييم الموظفين, أجهزة البصمة
seed_data_creation: Test face photo saved to first employee during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Face photo feature fully implemented and tested. POST /api/employees/{id}/face-photo saves base64 image to employee record. GET /api/employees returns face_photo and face_photo_updated_at. UI shows camera button in employee actions, dialog displays employee info with refresh button. Employee avatars show photo or initial letter. Auto-sync in BiometricDevices.js shows toast notifications when new attendance arrives. ZKTeco device is MOCKED (localhost:9999 agent not available).

verified_features.feature: POST /api/employees/{id}/face-photo saves face_photo to employee record
verified_features.details: Endpoint saves base64 image and sets face_photo_updated_at timestamp

verified_features.feature: GET /api/employees returns face_photo and face_photo_updated_at fields
Face photo button visible in employee actions row on HR page
verified_features.details: Camera button with data-testid='face-photo-{id}' found for each employee

verified_features.feature: Face photo dialog opens when clicking camera button
Face photo dialog shows employee name, UID, and refresh button
verified_features.details: Dialog shows: employee name (أحمد محمد), UID (#1), position (كاشير), refresh button (تحديث الصورة), close button (إغلاق)

verified_features.feature: Employee avatar shows in name column (photo or initial letter)
verified_features.details: Avatar elements found - green circle with initial for employees without photo, img.rounded-full for employees with photo

verified_features.feature: Overtime tab visible in HR page tabs
verified_features.details: Tab 'الأوقات الإضافية' with data-testid='overtime-tab' found and clickable
All 9 tabs clickable: الموظفين, الحضور, السلف, الخصومات, المكافآت, الأوقات الإضافية, كشوفات الرواتب, تقييم الموظفين, أجهزة البصمة

verified_features.feature: Auto-sync toast notifications for new attendance
verified_features.details: BiometricDevices.js line 119-127 shows toast.success with new attendance count when auto-sync finds new records
Endpoint correctly returns 404 for invalid employee_id

mocked_apis_list: ZKTeco biometric device endpoints (localhost:9999) - requires local Windows agent

notes: All requested features verified. Face photo save endpoint works correctly. EmployeeResponse includes face_photo and face_photo_updated_at. UI shows camera button in employee actions, dialog displays employee info with refresh button. Employee avatars display photo or initial letter. Auto-sync shows toast notifications. ZKTeco device is MOCKED - face photo fetch from device will fail with 'فشل الاتصال بالوكيل المحلي' (Failed to connect to local agent) which is expected behavior.
